repo_signals: L3 smoke for code.desktop.electron: main vs renderer process, IPC with a preload bridge, contextIsolation security, native modules, and electron-builder packaging with auto-update
build a server-rendered marketing site deployed to a CDN

retrieval_query: electron main renderer process ipc contextisolation preload nodeintegration native module packaging auto-update security

validation_smoke.name: code.desktop.electron L3 validation smoke
signals: contextIsolation enabled and nodeIntegration disabled on every renderer
preload exposes only a minimal allow-listed API via contextBridge
every ipcMain handler validates sender and payload
native module rebuilt against the app's Electron ABI
auto-update artifacts are code-signed and served over HTTPS

diagnosis_smoke.name: code.desktop.electron diagnosis smoke
signals: renderer created with nodeIntegration:true loading web content
preload exposing ipcRenderer or require directly to the page
ipcMain handler trusting payload without validation
blocking work on the main process freezing all windows
native module crash from Electron/Node ABI mismatch
